content: {"analyses":[{"source_url":"https://www.thelancet.com/journals/eclinm/article/PIIS2589-5370(24)00098-1/fulltext","source_title":"Intermittent fasting and health outcomes: an umbrella review of systematic reviews and meta-analyses of randomised controlled trials","source_type":"journal_article","source_quality":0.95,"overall_relevance":0.98,"year":2024,"authors":[""],"venue":"eClinicalMedicine (The Lancet)","doi":"","atomic_facts":[{"statement":"Schwingshackl 2020 found TWF/MADF vs CER produced a mean body weight reduction of -0.55 kg across 13 studies with no heterogeneity.","direct_quote":"Body weight TWF, MADF/CER 13 MD -0.55 (-1.01, -0.09) 0.019 I2 0.0 GRADE Moderate","fact_category":"statistic","relevance_score":0.92,"confidence":0.9,"perspective":"Scientific"},{"statement":"Schwingshackl 2020 reported TWF vs CER produced a mean body weight reduction of -1.37 kg across 9 studies rated moderate GRADE.","direct_quote":"Body weight TWF/CER 9 MD -1.37 (-2.24, -0.49) 0.002 I2 0.0 Moderate","fact_category":"statistic","relevance_score":0.9,"confidence":0.9,"perspective":"Scientific"},{"statement":"He 2021 meta-analysis of 11 studies found MADF/TWF vs CER reduced body weight by -0.95 kg with low heterogeneity.","direct_quote":"Body weight MADF, TWF/CER 11 MD -0.95 (-1.63, -0.27) 0.006 I2 21.3 Moderate","fact_category":"statistic","relevance_score":0.88,"confidence":0.9,"perspective":"Scientific"},{"statement":"Li 2022 reported TWF/MADF vs regular diet produced a body weight reduction of -2.48 kg in metabolic syndrome patients across 4 studies.","direct_quote":"Body weight TWF, MADF/RD 4 MD -2.48 (-3.22, -1.74) <0.001 I2 0.0 Moderate","fact_category":"statistic","relevance_score":0.87,"confidence":0.9,"perspective":"Scientific"},{"statement":"Zaman 2023 meta-analysis of 14 TRE studies versus unrestricted diet found body weight reduction of -2.25 kg with high heterogeneity I-squared 93.8 percent.","direct_quote":"Body weight TRE/Unrestricted diet 14 MD -2.25 (-3.09, -1.42) <0.001 I2 93.8 Moderate","fact_category":"statistic","relevance_score":0.93,"confidence":0.9,"perspective":"Scientific"},{"statement":"Liang 2023 meta-analysis of 23 TRE intervention studies found body weight reduction of -1.69 kg with very high heterogeneity.","direct_quote":"Body weight TRE, TRE + RT, TRE + Diet/Non-intervention diet 23 MD -1.69 (-2.27, -1.11) <0.001 I2 97.5","fact_category":"statistic","relevance_score":0.89,"confidence":0.9,"perspective":"Scientific"},{"statement":"Liang 2023 reported TRE intervention produced a BMI reduction of -0.46 across 15 studies compared to non-intervention diet.","direct_quote":"Body mass index TRE, TRE + RT, TRE + Diet/Non-intervention diet 15 MD -0.46 (-0.67, -0.24) <0.001 I2 78.2","fact_category":"measurement","relevance_score":0.85,"confidence":0.9,"perspective":"Scientific"},{"statement":"Gu 2022 meta-analysis included 43 RCTs with 2,483 participants comparing intermittent fasting to non-intervention and caloric restriction diets.","direct_quote":"Gu et al., 2022 Adults with overweight or obesity 43 18-70 2483 ADF, TRE, TWF, ADF+CR","fact_category":"methodology","relevance_score":0.82,"confidence":0.9,"perspective":"Methodological"},{"statement":"Allaf 2021 Cochrane review of intermittent fasting for CVD prevention included 18 RCTs with 1,125 participants aged 18-75.","direct_quote":"Allaf et al., 2021 Cochrane Database Syst Rev 18 18-75 1125 ADF, IF MADF, TRF, TWF","fact_category":"methodology","relevance_score":0.9,"confidence":0.9,"perspective":"Scientific"},{"statement":"Liu 2023 meta-analysis of 4 studies found TRE versus normal diet reduced body weight by -3.08 kg in physically active individuals.","direct_quote":"Body weight TRE/Normal diet 4 MD -3.08 (-5.29, -0.86) 0.006 I2 0.0 Moderate","fact_category":"statistic","relevance_score":0.84,"confidence":0.9,"perspective":"Scientific"}],"evidence_summary":"Umbrella review of 23 meta-analyses showing intermittent fasting produces modest but statistically significant weight loss vs continuous energy restriction and non-intervention diets, with most GRADE ratings moderate."}]}
